mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m3.register_date as regDate, m2.nickname, m2.phone_number as phoneNumber, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_report r WHERE r.target_id = m1.member_id) as reportCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN member3 m3 ON m1.member_id = m3.member_id ORDER BY m1.member_id DESC

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m1.gender, m1.birthday, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image, m2.bio, m2.phone_number, m2.last_login_at, m2.equipped_badge_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_report r WHERE r.target_id = m1.member_id) as reportCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'USER' THEN 1 END) AS userCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'PARTNER' THEN 1 END) AS partnerCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ADMIN' THEN 1 END) AS adminCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS activeCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS banCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 3 THEN 1 END) AS dormantCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 4 THEN 1 END) AS withdrawCount,
COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(m3.register_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 END) AS todayNewCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(m3.register_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) THEN 1 END) AS yesterdayNewCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member3 m3 ON m1.member_id = m3.member_id
